text.tspan: COMMIT STORM
@liuzhen9320 drops 10 commits in 7 days, outpacing the rest of the team.
NO SURVIVORS
Watch @liuzhen9320 delete 1,204 lines of legacy auth code in a single commit.
EXPERTS BAFFLED
Morning coffee? @liuzhen9320 pushes 2 commits before 9 AM, clocking 42 total this week.
DEVELOPING
Breaking: @liuzhen9320 migrates three repos to OAuth2 PKCE, sources say it's historic.
UNPRECEDENTED
Alert: @liuzhen9320 deploys JWT sessions to prod on a Wednesday, witnesses report maniacal laughter.
